services.name: Botox
services.description: Anti-wrinkle injections for forehead lines, crow's feet, and frown lines.
services.aftercare: Avoid lying down for 4 hours post-treatment, no strenuous exercise for 24 hours.

services.name: Fillers
services.description: Dermal fillers for lips, cheeks, and nasolabial folds.
services.aftercare: Avoid touching the treated area for 6 hours, no extreme heat for 24 hours.

services.name: Consultation
services.description: Free initial consultation to discuss your aesthetic goals and suitability for treatments.

booking.cancellation_policy: 24-hour notice required for cancellations. Late cancellations may incur a fee.

escalate_if: Medical question or health concern raised
More than 2 questions cannot be answered from SOP
Customer explicitly requests a human agent

faqs.a: Safety is best discussed with one of our qualified practitioners during a free consultation. Please book a consultation and we can address all your concerns in detail.
Botox results typically last between 3 to 6 months, after which a top-up may be recommended.
Payment plan enquiries should be discussed directly with our team. Please request to speak with a human agent and they will assist you.
We require at least 24 hours notice for cancellations. Late cancellations may incur a fee.
Yes! Initial consultations at Bloom Aesthetics are completely free of charge.
